jd_text: Job Description 1inch is the DeFi ecosystem building financial freedom for everyone. 1inch products help users and builders trade, hold and track digital assets - with the self-custody, comprehensive security and the intuitive user experience they need to unlock the potential of true crypto ownership. 1inch protocols and APIs provide core infrastructure across the DeFi industry and beyond. So if you’re someone who thinks big, moves fast and wants to make an impact right from day one, then get ready to join our industry-changing team. Location: We prioritise candidates who are based in Dubai then consider those working remotely in one of our European Hub Locations (UK, Spain or Germany). As Head of Product Design, you will shape the future of user experience at 1inch by driving the vision, strategy, and execution of design across all our products in crypto, blockchain, and DeFi. You are a key leader aligning design with business goals and technology innovation, influencing product roadmaps at the executive level and inspiring teams to deliver world-class, user-centered experiences. You will ensure validated, end-to-end UX flows are delivered ahead of launch milestones, using data, experimentation, and user insight to reduce late-stage UX changes and accelerate delivery. Design under your leadership directly supports revenue growth through higher trading conversion, improved retention, and a cohesive, scalable product experience. By strengthening design systems and cross-functional collaboration, you help reduce UX-related support tickets and raise the overall quality bar across platforms. This role requires a strategic mindset, strong leadership, deep Web3 and crypto UX expertise, and the ability to operate seamlessly across product, engineering, marketing, and business teams. Key Responsibilities Lead long-term UX planning across 1inch products, defining a multi-year design direction while delivering fast, incremental improvements that balance innovation, scalability, and reliable execution Own UX readiness for product launches, ensuring validated end-to-end user flows are delivered ahead of engineering milestones and late-stage UX changes are minimized Ensure a cohesive, user-centric product experience at scale through strong design system adoption Oversee the evolution of the design system, brand consistency, and accessibility standards across all platforms Manage and grow a team of Product Designers, including hiring, mentorship, performance management, and long-term career development Requirements 7+ years of progressive experience in UX/UI/Product Design leadership roles, ideally in crypto, fintech, or complex tech ecosystems Proven track record of managing and scaling design teams delivering cross-platform products (web, iOS, Android) Proven ownership of design systems and scalable UX foundations across multiple products Demonstrated ability to drive measurable business outcomes (conversion, retention, revenue) through design Deep understanding of UX principles, interaction design, accessibility, and branding within blockchain/Web3 context Strong strategic thinking with the ability to balance visionary leadership and operational execution Excellent communication and storytelling skills for diverse audiences, including executives and technical teams Fluent English communication skills (written and spoken), with the ability to clearly articulate complex design concepts to executive and technical audiences Nice to Have Background in cryptocurrency DeFi and blockchain ecosystems UX or product design certifications (e.g. Nielsen Norman Group) are a plus Why work for us? Join a young, creative team in a fast-paced and supportive environment We’re open to new ideas — if you’ve got a vision, pitch it and make it happen Enjoy competitive pay that matches your skills and experience Be part of a company that’s shaping the future of DeFi Take time when you need it — we offer unlimited vacation days Get fully compensated for your work gear — we’ll set you up for success We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
